title: medicago tornata var. striata
intro: Medicago tornata var. striata, also known as Stick Medic or Striated Medick, is a perennial legume in the pea family Fabaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Medicago tornata var. striata include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. It is commonly prepared as a tincture, tea, or infused oil, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from skin issues to gastrointestinal problems.
intro_study: According to "Archivos de cardiologia de Mexico", Medicago tornata var. striata was part of a recipe for heart palpitations that exhibited anti-inflammatory, anxiolytic, and antioxidant effects.
